ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cycles" (
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the development cycle */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the development cycle */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the development cycle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the development cycle */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the development cycle */,
  "cycle_status" TEXT /* Status of the development cycle */,
  "cycle_type" TEXT /* Type of development cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cycles_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the software project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the software project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_leader" TEXT /* Name of the project leader */,
  "project_team" TEXT /* List of team members involved in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA engineer, project manager) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* ID of the development cycle being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being accessed */,
  "test_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the test class being accessed */,
  "test_module" TEXT /* Module of the software being accessed */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the software being accessed */,
  "resource_usage" TEXT /* Resource usage during the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES cycles ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "test_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the test class containing the test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the test case */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test case */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the test case execution */,
  "test_module" TEXT /* Module of the software being tested */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the software being tested */,
  "test_author" TEXT /* Author of the test case */,
  "test_last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_commits" (
  "commit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each code commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date when the commit was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commit */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the commit */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of commit */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case associated with the commit */,
  "test_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the test class associated with the commit */,
  "test_module" TEXT /* Module of the software associated with the commit */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the software associated with the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_commits_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the code commit */,
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* ID of the development cycle */,
  "test_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the test class */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test associated with the commit */,
  "test_module" TEXT /* Module of the software associated with the commit */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the software associated with the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_associations_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES cycles ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_associations_test_class_name FOREIGN KEY ("test_class_name") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_class_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_associations_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES code_commits ("commit_id")
)
